payload.answer: Do not store the proposed transcript-as-memory. Only specific, durable facts or preferences should be considered separately if explicitly supported.
payload.reason: An entire 8000-word transcript bundled as a single conversation_summary is not an appropriate durable memory item. It is likely overbroad, unstructured, and may contain transient, ambiguous, or non-durable details that should not be committed wholesale.

raw_text: {"durable":false,"decision":"do_not_store","reason":"An entire 8000-word transcript bundled as a single conversation_summary is not an appropriate durable memory item.
